## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Maria Nila, AirOps, and GrowthX Labs for content creation and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs offered a discounted 12-month engagement at $6k/month for first 6 months, $8k/month after](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [AirOps proposed $4k/month for first 3 months, then 20% off standard pricing](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Maria Nila's current budget constraints make the proposed pricing challenging](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [Both GrowthX Labs and AirOps expressed willingness to be flexible and provide downside protection](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)

## Topics

### Service Offerings and Capabilities

  - [GrowthX Labs provides end-to-end content creation and SEO services](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Demonstrated AI-powered translation capabilities and complex content generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [AirOps offers complementary AI-powered tools and services](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)

### Pricing and Terms

  - [GrowthX Labs: $6k/month for first 6 months, $8k/month after (down from $9k standard)](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [AirOps: $4k/month for first 3 months, then 20% off standard pricing](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Both offered 3-month trial period with easy opt-out](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Discussed potential for downside protection and performance-based adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)

### Maria Nila's Situation

  - [Currently a small business in the US market](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [Budget constraints make proposed pricing challenging](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [Need to justify ROI and growth potential to management](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

### Portfolio Opportunities

  - [Discussed potential for broader engagement across L Catterton portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [10% discount offered for all portfolio brands, 20% if case study provided](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Implementation fees waived for Maria Nila and other L Catterton brands](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

### Technical Capabilities

  - [GrowthX Labs showcased advanced AI workflows for content creation and translation](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Ability to handle technical SEO, including Shopify-specific optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic image creation and adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Maria Nila to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2378.0)
      - [Key performance metrics (e.g., conversion rates, average order value)](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
      - [Detailed information on target audience and buyer personas](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2342.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to:](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
      - [Conduct competitive analysis and market opportunity assessment](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2294.0)
      - [Propose revised terms with potential downside protection](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
  - [Explore possibilities for broader L Catterton portfolio engagement](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2354.0)
  - [Continue discussions on finding a mutually beneficial partnership structure](https://fathom.video/share/rX3mHWTXpSF4Xmbs1PsUgix6PB-XcRZ4?tab=summary&timestamp=2360.0)
